title: The Message I Never Sent
content: For almost three months, Julia kept a message saved in her phone without ever sending it. She had written it after realizing she was in love with her longtime friend, Ethan. Every evening she opened the conversation, read the words again, and closed the app without pressing send. She was afraid that honesty might change everything between them. One afternoon, Ethan invited her to a quiet café. During their conversation, he admitted that he had been waiting for her to notice his feelings. Julia smiled, deleted the unsent message, and told him everything face to face. Sometimes the words we fear saying become easier when spoken with a smile instead of a screen.
